response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and 10+ years of experience, critical requirements are unmet: native-level Japanese proficiency is listed as required but absent from the resume, and there is no demonstrated experience with security technologies, embedded networking, switch products, or the networking domain (Layer 2/3, NETCONF, SNMP, etc.). Additionally, C programming experience dates back to 2014 (10 years) with recent work focused on TypeScript/JavaScript, raising concerns about current C proficiency needed for embedded UNIX development.
strengths: Extensive software development background (10+ years) across embedded, web, and systems programming domains
Demonstrated ability to work with low-level systems including embedded development and some C/C++ experience
Proven Linux and systems knowledge with experience building developer tools and infrastructure
concerns: Complete absence of required native-level Japanese language proficiency—a stated required qualification
No demonstrated experience with security technologies, networking technologies, or embedded networking firmware development
C programming experience is outdated (last significant use in 2014-2015); recent decade focused on TypeScript/JavaScript rather than embedded systems

key_factors.factor: Lack of security/embedded networking domain expertise
Outdated C proficiency and focus on high-level languages recently
